title: Build admin panel and publishing flow
goal: Allow the owner to log in and manage posts, projects, media, and settings.
verification: Admin cannot access dashboard without login.
Admin can create a draft post.
Admin can publish a post visible on public blog.
notes: Added dashboard, posts list, new post, edit post, comments moderation, projects, and media pages.
Added frontend proxy protection for /admin routes using the portfolio_admin_session cookie.
Connected the admin login form to the Go API login endpoint with credentials included.
Added Go API admin login, logout, me, post list, post create, post update, and post delete endpoints.
Added bcrypt password verification, random session tokens, hashed session storage, and HttpOnly SameSite=Lax admin cookies.
Added ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD bootstrap for the first admin user when the database is configured.
Added public /api/posts and /api/posts/{slug} endpoints backed by PostgreSQL for published posts.
npm --workspace apps/web run build passes and prerenders admin routes.
Smoke test with disposable postgres:13 passes: unauthenticated admin me returns 401, login returns 200, draft creation returns 201, publish returns 200, and public posts returns the published post.
